message:
refactor(cli): Extract test helper types to module level

Move TestData, TestCmd, and related test implementations from inside
test functions to module-level definitions within the tests module.
This satisfies clippy's items_inside_test_module lint while improving
test code organization.

Changes:
- cli/mod.rs: Extract TestData (Serialize + Outputtable) and TestCmd
  (Completable) structs to tests module scope
- cli/output.rs: Minor import cleanup
- cli/progress.rs: Formatting consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
